data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario regarding agent behavior baselines and drift detection. However, there is no concrete evidence provided in the prior steps that directly addresses or confirms the expected results of this scenario. The linked use cases and prior evidence do not provide sufficient data to assert a definitive outcome, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of agent behavior baselines and drift detection.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the expected outcomes of agent behavior baselines and drift detection.
